before_merge: preserve Foundry, Command, Sentinel, Promoter, CI, and rollback logs
delete branch codex/multi-repo-low-risk-rehearsal-repo-1 through governed git path
after_merge: open a governed revert pull request for internal/cli/cli_test.go
merge revert only through existing gates
post_rollback_readback: Command readback records repo one reverted or held
Sentinel hold remains or is reasserted
